sectiondef.header: Protection bit masks of various eFuses

briefdescription.para: eFuse protection bits for security control
eFuse protection bits for security misc 0
eFuse protection bits for PPK0 hash
eFuse protection bits for Meta header IV
eFuse protection bits for ME ID code and CRC
eFuse protection bit for PUF Challenge Hash
eFuse protection bits for security misc 1
Number of PUF SYN user-data rows per page.
Bits representing PUF row index within a page; shift by 6 => page index.
Mask to extract in-page PUF row offset (LSB 6 bits: 0..63)
This function is used to take care of prerequisites to program below eFuses AES key User key 0 User key 1.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Type of key to be programmed(AesKey/UserKey0/UserKey1)
- Pointer to the XNvm_AesKey structure, which holds Aes key to be programmed to eFuse.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_AES_KEY Error while writing AES key.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_USER_KEY0 Error while writing User key0.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_USER_KEY1 Error while writing User key1.
Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse controller. On error return appropriate failure code.
Validate the Aes write request before writing AES into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING, if not success.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to to take care of prerequisitis to program below eFuses PPK0_HASH PPK1_HASH PPK2_HASH.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Type of ppk hash to be programmed(PPK0/PPK1/PPK2)
- Pointer to the XNvm_PpkHash structure which holds PPK hash to be programmed to eFuse.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PPK0_HASH Error while writing PPK0 Hash.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PPK1_HASH Error while writing PPK1 Hash.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PPK2_HASH Error while writing PPK2 Hash.
Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse controller. On error return appropriate failure code.
Validate the PPK hash write request before writing PPK into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING, if not success.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to to take care of prerequisitis to program below IV eFuses XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_META_HEADER_IV XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_BLK_OBFUS_IV XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PLM_IV XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_DATA_PARTITION_IV.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Type of IV eFuses to be programmmed
- Pointer to the XNvm_EfuseIvs structure which holds IV to be programmed to eFuse.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_META_HEADER_IV Error while writing Meta Iv.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_BLK_OBFUS_IV Error while writing BlkObfus IV.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PLM_IV Error while writing PLM IV.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_DATA_PARTITION_IV Error while writing Data Partition IV.
Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse controller. On error return appropriate failure code.
Validate IVs write request before writing IVs into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING, if not success.

briefdescription.para: This function reloads the cache of eFUSE so that can be directly read from cache and programs required protections eFuses.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CACHE_LOAD Error while loading the cache.

simplesect.para: Not recommended to call this API frequently,if this API is called all the cache memory is reloaded by reading eFUSE array, reading eFUSE bit multiple times may diminish the life time.

listitem.para: Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success
Reload Cache and check protection bits.
Write protection bits into eFuse. Return error code upon failure.
Reload cache and check protection bits.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to program Glitch Configuration given by the user.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Pointer to the Glitch configuration

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_GLITCH_CFG Error in programming of glitch configuration.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_GLITCH_WRLK Error in programming glitch write lock.
Unlock eFuse controller. On error return appropriate failure code.
Compute glitch config programmable bits to program.
Program and verify the glitch config bits.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to program below DEC_ONLY fuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If DEC_ONLY eFuse is programmed successfully.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CACHE_PARITY Error in Cache reload after programming.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Validate Decrypt only request before programming. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING, if not success.
Program and verify decrypt only data. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_DEC_EFUSE_ONLY upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function writes Revocation eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- RevokeId number to program Revocation Id eFuses.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful write to eFuse.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_LOCK Error while Locking the controller.

simplesect.para: Example: If the revoke id to program is 64, it will program the 0th bit of the REVOCATION_ID_2 eFuse row.

listitem.para: Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse controller. Return appropriate error code upon failure.
Compute start column and row offset values.
Calculate the Row and Column numbers based on the revoke id number input provided.
Program revocation Ids data. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_REVOCATION_IDS upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs OffChip Revoke eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- OffchipIdNum number to program OffchipId eFuses.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful write of OffChipId.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_OFFCHIP_REVOKE_IDS Error in writing OffChipId eFuses.
Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Program and verify revocation Ids data. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_OFFCHIP_REVOKE_IDS upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs MiscCtrl eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- MiscCtrl data to be written to eFuses.

listitem.para: Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Compute MiscCtrl programmable bits to program.
Program and verify miscellaneous control bits. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_MISC_CTRL_BITS upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs SecCtrl eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- SecCtrl data to be written to eFuses.

listitem.para: Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Compute secure control programmable bits to program.
Program and verify security controls bits. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_SEC_CTRL_BITS upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs Misc1Ctrl eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Misc1Bits data to be written to eFuses.

listitem.para: Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Compute security misc1 programmable bits to program.
Program and verify miscellaneous 1 controls bits. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_MISC1_CTRL_BITS upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs BootEnvCtrl eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- BootEnvCtrl data to be written to eFuses.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_BOOT_ENV_CTRL Error while writing BootEnvCtrl Bits
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Compute BootEnvCtrl programmable bits to program.
Program and verify miscellaneous 1 controls bits. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_BOOT_ENV_CTRL upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to to take care of prerequisitis to program FIPS mode and FIPS version eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Fips mode to be written to eFuses.
- Fips version to be written to eFuses.

listitem.para: Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Validate Fips information. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs UDS eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Pointer to the XNvm_Uds structure.

listitem.para:
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_UDS On failure in UDS write.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM On Invalid input parameter.
Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Read security ctrl efuse cache register and check if UDS_WR_LK is programmed. If yes, return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING else proceed for UDS programming.
Reload cache and check protection bits.
Check UDS Crc. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_UDS upon failure

briefdescription.para: This function programs DME userkey eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- DME Key type DME_USER_KEY_0/1/2/3
- Pointer to DME userkey structure.

listitem.para: Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Check if DmeMode eFuse is programmed. If yes, return failure.

inbodydescription.para: Else unlock eFuse controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.

listitem.para: Program dme user key into eFuse.

briefdescription.para: This function programs DME Revoke eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- DmeRevoke eFuse number.

listitem.para: Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Program and verify dme revoke data.

briefdescription.para: This function programs PLM_UPDATE eFuse.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PLM_UPDATE Error while writing PlmUpdate eFuse.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Program and verify Plm update data.

briefdescription.para: This function programs BootModeDisable eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- BootModeMask to be programmed to BootModeDisable eFuses.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_BOOT_MODE_DISABLE Error while writing BootModeDisable eFuses.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Program and verify boot mode disable data.

briefdescription.para: This function programs DmeMode eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- DmeMode eFuses to be written.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_DME_MODE Error while writing DmeMode eFuse.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Program and verify dme mode data

briefdescription.para: This function programs EFUSE_CRC_SALT eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- Crc value to be written.

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_CRC_SALT Error while writing Crc salt eFuses.
Read CRC eFUSE cache offset. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_CRC | XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING if crc non zero.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Program and verify Uds Crc data. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_CRC upon failure.
Program and verify Uds Crc salt data. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_CRC_SALT upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This function programs ROM Rsvd Bits eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- RomRsvdBits to be programmed to RomRsvd eFUSE bits

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_ROM_RSVD Error while writing ROM Rsvd eFuse bits.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Compute programmable data for RomRsvd data.

briefdescription.para: This function programs Puf control bits specified by user.

parameterdescription.para: - Environmental monitoring flag set by the user, when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.
- PufCtrlBits input to be programmed

listitem.para: Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.

briefdescription.para: This function programs PUF ctrl and PUF helper data, Chash and Aux.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to XNvm_EfusePufHdAddr structure

listitem.para: XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_HELPER_DATA Error while writing Puf helper data.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_SYN_DATA Error while writing Puf Syndata.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_CHASH Error while writing Puf Chash.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_AUX Error while writing Puf Aux.

simplesect.para: To generate PufSyndromeData please use XPuf_Registration API.

listitem.para: Validate input parameters. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Unlock eFuse Controller. Return appropriate error code if not success.
Read directly from cache offset of the PufCtrl data.
Check if Puf helper data is empty. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_BEFORE_PROGRAMMING if empty.
Write puf syndrome data into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_SYN_DATA upon failure.
Write puf chash data into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_CHASH upon failure.
Write puf aux into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_PUF_AUX upon failure.
Write puf RoSwap data into eFuse. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_WRITE_RO_SWAP upon failure.

briefdescription.para: This file contains function declarations of eFuse APIs.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- ---------- ------------------------------------------------------- 3.0 kal 07/12/2022 Initial release 3.2 har 02/21/2023 Added support for writing ROM Rsvd bits kpt 07/26/2023 Removed XNvm_EfuseReadCacheRange vss 12/31/2023 Added support for Program the eFuse protection bits only once 3.7 nik 01/06/2026 Added support to allow use of PUF Helper Data eFUSEs for general purpose.
